code:
%%{Education_ClassroomService}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-09.01 — Knowledge Ingestion Pipeline (Education_LMS_Portal)

[Education_ClassroomService] --> DISCOVER : SourceDiscovered
note right of DISCOVER
  Discover new sources:
  • hub/project outputs, repos, web docs, datasets
  • governance & treasury artifacts
  • manual submissions or connectors
end note

DISCOVER --> INGEST : SourceSelected
note right of INGEST
  Fetch & stage raw content (Education_GradeSync)
  • capture provenance (Education_GradeSync)
  • store raw blob refs for audit
end note

INGEST --> PARSE : SourceFetched
note right of PARSE
  Content extraction & normalization
  • text, tables, code blocks, media metadata
  • language detect, mime routing
end note

PARSE --> DEDUP : Parsed
note right of DEDUP
  De-duplication & canonicalization
  • simhash/LSH near-duplicate checks
  • keep canonical doc id
end note

DEDUP --> ENTITY_LINK : Deduped
note right of ENTITY_LINK
  NER + entity resolution:
  • link to DID, project, hub, proposal, stream
  • add typed edges with confidences
end note

ENTITY_LINK --> EMBED : EntitiesLinked
note right of EMBED
  Embedding & feature generation:
  • domain-specific models
  • chunking + vector store write
end note

EMBED --> INTEGRATE : EmbeddingGenerated
note right of INTEGRATE
  Integrate into graph:
  • apply ontology constraints
  • validate schemas & ids
end note

INTEGRATE --> SYNTH : Integrated
note right of SYNTH
  Synthesis:
  • summaries, explanations, citations
  • produce derived notes & insights
end note

SYNTH --> PUBLISH : KnowledgeUpdated
note right of PUBLISH
  Publish to consumers:
  • Metrics (Education_ContentCDN), UI (Education_GradeSync), API (Education_GradeSync)
  • expose search/RAG endpoints
end note

PUBLISH --> [Education_StudentDB] : Published

%% ---- Quality review & human-in-the-loop ----
EMBED --> REVIEW : LowConfidence / DriftDetected
ENTITY_LINK --> REVIEW : AmbiguousLink
REVIEW --> EMBED : ReEmbed
REVIEW --> ENTITY_LINK : FixLinking
REVIEW --> REJECTED : NotRelevant
REJECTED --> [Education_StudentDB]

%% ---- Failure & recovery paths ----
INGEST --> FAILED : FetchError / AuthError
PARSE --> FAILED : ExtractError / UnsupportedFormat
INTEGRATE --> FAILED : SchemaMismatch / ConstraintViolation
FAILED --> [Education_ContentCDN] : IngestionFailed

%% ---- Maintenance / indexing ----
PUBLISH --> UPDATE_INDEX : BuildIndexes
UPDATE_INDEX --> [Education_StudentDB] : IndexReady

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DISCOVER,INGEST,PARSE,DEDUP,ENTITY_LINK,EMBED,INTEGRATE,SYNTH,PUBLISH,REVIEW,REJECTED,FAILED,UPDATE_INDEX core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育LMS门户设计一个知识摄取管道，从Education_ClassroomService发现内容，最终写入Education_StudentDB。核心流程我想分成八个主要阶段。
明白，八个阶段：发现、摄取、解析、去重、实体链接、嵌入、集成、合成、发布。最后两个是SYNTH和PUBLISH对吗？另外失败和人工审核的分支需要现在考虑吗？
对的，SYNTH做知识合成，PUBLISH输出到三个下游：Education_ContentCDN做指标、Education_GradeSync做UI和API。失败分支必须有，INGEST阶段可能遇到FetchError或AuthError。
好，主干画好了。我注意到PARSE阶段也可能失败，比如ExtractError或UnsupportedFormat，还有INTEGRATE的SchemaMismatch。这些我都连到FAILED节点，最终指向Education_ContentCDN记录失败。
还需要人工审核的回路。EMBED阶段如果检测到LowConfidence或Drift，要进REVIEW；ENTITY_LINK遇到AmbiguousLink也要进REVIEW。审核通过可以回到EMBED重新嵌入，或者修复链接。
REVIEW如果判定NotRelevant呢？直接丢弃到REJECTED吗？REJECTED的终点是Education_StudentDB还是单独处理？
NotRelevant进REJECTED，但REJECTED也落地到Education_StudentDB，只是标记为已拒绝。另外PUBLISH之后要有索引更新，UPDATE_INDEX节点，完成后再写Education_StudentDB。

已添加UPDATE_INDEX分支。我检查一下状态转移：DISCOVER到INGEST是SourceSelected，INGEST到PARSE是SourceFetched，PARSE到DEDUP是Parsed，DEDUP到ENTITY_LINK是Deduped，ENTITY_LINK到EMBED是EntitiesLinked，EMBED到INTEGRATE是EmbeddingGenerated，INTEGRATE到SYNTH是Integrated，SYNTH到PUBLISH是KnowledgeUpdated，最后PUBLISH到Education_StudentDB是Published。对吗？
INGEST到PARSE的触发条件应该是SourceFetched，但INGEST阶段本身要注明涉及Education_GradeSync，捕获来源信息。还有DEDUP节点，我们要用simhash/LSH做近似去重。
修正了，INGEST的note里加了Education_GradeSync和来源追溯。DEDUP的note也补了simhash/LSH和canonical doc id。ENTITY_LINK部分需要特别说明DID链接吗？
ENTITY_LINK要链接到DID、project、hub、proposal、stream，加带置信度的类型化边。EMBED用领域专用模型，做分块和向量存储写入。
INTEGRATE阶段的本体约束和schema验证也补上了。最后样式方面，核心节点用橙色填充、白色粗体文字，这样符合规范吗？
完美，所有核心节点都应用这个样式。标题定为SM-09.01 — Knowledge Ingestion Pipeline (Education_LMS_Portal)，可以定稿了。
